mapper.sql: id, article_id, author_id, status, applied_at, reviewed_at, reviewed_by, review_note, version
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article_recommendation_application (article_id, author_id, status, applied_at, reviewed_at, reviewed_by, review_note, created_at, updated_at, version) VALUES (#{articleId}, #{authorId}, #{status}, #{appliedAt}, #{reviewedAt}, #{reviewedBy}, #{reviewNote}, NOW(), NOW(), #{version})
mapper.update: UPDATE article_recommendation_application SET status = #{status}, reviewed_at = #{reviewedAt}, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, review_note = #{reviewNote}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT FROM article_recommendation_application WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND status = 'PENDING' AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY applied_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM article_recommendation_application WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article_recommendation_application WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
AND status = #{status}
